'''Pols Anaxes''' was the capital city of [[Anaxes/Legends|Anaxes]]. Home to the [[Anaxes Citadel]], it was the [[Planet/Legends|planet's]] primary civilian [[Spaceport/Legends|spaceport]]. The city and surrounding terraced [[Sirpar Hills]] were places of utmost grace and nearly all motorized vehicles were banned. It was a system of underground access tubes that allowed [[Landspeeder/Legends|speeders]] and groundcars to get to and from destinations. Aboveground, only quiet hover-limos and [[Keffi/Legends|Keffi]]-drawn carriages were used.

It was also home to one of the [[Republic Detention Center]]s. The detention center was led by the 55th Mechanized Infantry by the time of [[19 BBY/Legends|19 BBY]].
